comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Implementation order: tau-0hyv (canonical .pi/loops schemas/path policy) -> tau-xumb (shared loop engine lifecycle) -> parallel specializations tau-swek (Ralph migration) and tau-4uit (autoresearch contract/commands) -> tau-qnuo (isolated VCS checkout + blocked resolution) -> tau-owmv (autoresearch_run/autoresearch_done wired against the new model) -> tau-9622 (legacy surface removal/import-or-fail-fast cleanup). Each child task carries enough detail to implement without reopening the ADR, while the ADR remains the architectural source of context.
